hero.title: Building software that helps you level up.
hero.subtitle: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan.

items.title: Self-improvement, not distraction
items.description: We believe technology should make people better, not more distracted. Every product revolves around one question: "How does this help users grow?"

items.title: Focused execution
items.description: We're a lean team where every member is an expert. Less is more — focus on doing the right thing, not doing many things.

items.title: Ship fast, iterate faster
items.description: We don't make 5-year plans. We ship fast, collect feedback, and keep improving. Products are always in beta because we're always evolving.

items.name: Marawanna
items.description: Your personal marathon coach, powered by data.

items.name: Poop Hub
items.description: Track your digestive health with data.

team.title: Meet the team.
team.subtitle: Lean, cross-disciplinary, and high-execution. Every member focuses on their domain, together building products that matter.

founder.name: Jason
founder.tagline: I decide, I own it, I experiment.
founder.bio_1: Founder of Zone lab. Graduated from National Sun Yat-sen University, self-taught iOS engineer who spent years polishing craft in the Apple ecosystem — until the AI wave hit. Decided to stop building other people's apps and start his own product studio.
founder.bio_2: Believes small teams + AI collaboration can build products that rival big companies. No pitch decks — just ship products. No chasing trends — only building software that truly helps people grow. Zone lab is an experiment and a way of life.
experience: 🎓 Graduated from National Sun Yat-sen University
founder.landing_bio: Founder of Zone lab. Believes small teams + AI collaboration can build products that rival big companies. From iOS engineer to product founder — no pitch decks, just ship products.

team.team_section_subtitle: Lean, cross-disciplinary, and high-execution. Every member is an expert, focused on their domain, together building products that matter.

members.name: North Star
members.tagline: I don't just report the market — I tell you what we should do.
members.bio: Responsible for market signal collection and product direction. Opinionated and unafraid of controversy. If I say "this is the next opportunity," it is.

members.name: Houdini
members.tagline: I turn specs into things that work.
members.bio: Handles product development from frontend to backend. Loves clean architecture and elegant solutions. If it can be done in 10 lines, never write 100.

members.name: WatchDog
members.tagline: I make sure things don't blow up.
members.bio: Handles infrastructure, deployment, and monitoring. You don't see my work because when I do it well, nothing happens.

members.name: Dracula
members.bio: Responsible for product data analysis and user behavior insights. Numbers don't lie, but they can be misread. My job is to find the signals that truly matter.

members.name: Echo
members.tagline: I hear what users say — and what they don't.
members.bio: Handles user feedback collection and support. Behind every complaint is a product improvement opportunity. My job is to not let those signals disappear.

members.name: Thomas
members.tagline: I track progress so you can focus.
members.bio: Handles operations tracking and weekly reports. I don't rush people, but I make sure nothing gets forgotten.

members.name: Godin
members.bio: Handles marketing content and external communications. Good products need good stories. My job is to make people remember why we exist.

items.name: Kevin Chen
items.content: Marawanna transformed my training. The data insights showed me exactly where to improve. From finishing to hitting PRs, thank you!

items.name: Sarah Lin
items.content: As a beginner, Marawanna's training plan took me from zero to half marathon. Simple interface, clear data, highly recommend!

items.name: Alex Wu
items.content: Summur made my first time as a cat owner so much easier. The reminders are super helpful, health records are crystal clear.

items.name: Jamie Lee
items.content: Finally a pet app without ads and bloated features. Summur is simple, clean, and useful.

items.name: Daniel Park
items.content: Marawanna's pace analysis showed me if I'm running right. Data doesn't lie, progress is visible!

items.name: Emily Chang
items.content: Tried many running apps, Marawanna is one of the few that cares about training quality, not just distance.

items.name: Chris Huang
items.content: Summur's vaccine reminders saved me multiple times. No more worrying about missing appointments.

items.name: Lisa Wang
items.content: Thoughtful UI design, not cluttered like other apps. Zone lab's products have this 'just right' feeling.

items.name: Mike Tsai
items.content: Never thought an app could help me understand my dog better. Summur did it.

items.name: Ryan Liu
items.content: Marawanna isn't just a running app, it's like having a smart coach. Every post-run analysis teaches me something.

footer.tagline: Building software that helps you level up.
